payload.description: The current Medication Review: Pharmacy champion code is materially looser than the published guideline. The system/user prompts currently allow broad pharmacy-information discussion and even say No only when no pharmacy discussion occurs, while the guideline requires establishing a specific current pharmacy and excludes general/future/transfer-only discussion. Fix the live implementation so the prompt logic matches the published current-pharmacy rubric, then verify on representative SRX and SPM examples.
payload.title: Align Medication Review Pharmacy implementation with current-pharmacy guideline
